Explore 46 restaurants across Indian River County in Central Florida, each with its latest health inspection grade, dietary accommodations, and diner ratings. 34 currently hold an A health grade. Use the list below to compare scores and pick where to eat.

Indian River County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Indian River County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 46 Indian River County restaurants we grade, 34 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Indian River County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Indian River County?

We currently publish 46 graded restaurants in Indian River County, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 34 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
